added: 🎵 Profile Music! — Pick a song for your profile page from 22 BlipVibe originals
🎶 Songs tab in Skin Shop — browse, preview, buy (40 coins), and set songs
🎧 Profile music player on profile view — play/pause, volume, mute controls for visitors
🔁 Songs loop with smooth fade-out and fade-in between repeats
💰 Coin earn animation — your coin skin icon floats up when earning coins
📜 Daily Quests — Like 3 posts, Follow 2 users, Create 1 post for bonus coins
📊 Coin Progress Bar — track progress toward your next premium skin
🔥 Featured Skin — daily rotating premium skin highlight with countdown
🏆 Tiered Streak Rewards — Day 1: +10, Day 3: +20, Day 7: +50, Day 14: +100
🎵 Story Music — add songs to stories with start time picker and volume control
🎵 Songs in Group Shop — groups can buy songs with group coins
🎧 Global sticky mini player — stays visible on all pages with play/pause/volume/mute
🎶 Music auto-starts after first interaction on the page
🔀 Crossfade between your song and profile songs when visiting others
🎤 Song preview pauses your music, resumes when preview stops
🎮 Group Shop Apply tab redesigned — first tab showing all owned items (skins, fonts, songs)
🔔 Music reopen button in nav bar after closing the player
♾️ Infinity symbol now renders larger (28px) in nav
changed: 💰 Shop prices rebalanced: Fonts 25, Logos 35, Icons 35, Coins 50, Nav 60, Skins 75, Templates 100, Premium 300, Songs 40
📜 TOS updated (v9) — AI-generated music (Suno) disclosure, music library terms added
📝 Privacy Policy updated — music preferences and Suno AI disclosed
📁 Backup system added before major changes
🎮 Group Shop Apply tab is now the first tab instead of Basic Skins
fixed: ♾️ Infinity coins now persist properly (was being wiped by sync)
📱 Shared post preview redesigned — proper layout with thumbnails
📷 View All photos on other profiles now works correctly
👍 Like counts show correctly on profile view posts
🎵 Song preview pause button now works
💰 Songs no longer show 'Owned' for infinity users — shows 'Free' to add to collection
🔗 Shared post author name/avatar now clickable to view their profile
🎬 Lightbox video player now displays correctly on desktop and mobile
🎵 Playlist manager now only shows songs you own (not all songs)
🎥 URLs with underscores no longer broken by text formatting (fixes YouTube, etc.)
🔗 Feed URLs now properly hidden when embed or link preview is shown

added: 💰 Coin earn animation — your equipped coin skin icon floats up when you earn coins (+1, +2, +5)
🔻 Coin lose animation — red icon drops down when you unlike/remove (-1)
💎 Uses YOUR coin skin — diamond, fire, crown, heart, etc. matches what you have equipped
changed: 💰 Shop prices rebalanced again — Fonts 25, Logos 35, Icons 35, Coin Skins 50, Nav 60, Skins 75, Templates 100, Premium 300
🎯 Coin progress bar target updated to 300
fixed: ♾️ Infinity coins now persist — was being wiped by skin data sync every 10 seconds
♾️ Infinity symbol now renders larger (28px) in nav bar

added: 📜 Daily Quest System — Like 3 posts (+20), Follow 2 users (+20), Create 1 post (+35). Resets daily!
📊 Coin Progress Bar — see how close you are to your next premium skin
🔥 Featured Skin — daily rotating premium skin highlight with countdown timer
🏆 Tiered Streak Rewards — Day 1: +10, Day 3: +20, Day 7: +50, Day 14: +100 coins
📁 Backup system — backups folder created before major changes
changed: Daily login reward upgraded from flat 5 coins to tiered based on streak
Infinity coin display fix — now works reliably on all devices
fixed: Infinity symbol not showing on mobile (skin_data loading timing)
YouTube embeds on mobile — switched to thumbnail + play button

added: 🎉 BlipVibe has officially moved to blipvibe.com! Update your bookmarks!
💰 Coin economy rebalanced — new users start with 100 coins, shop prices updated for better progression
♾️ Early adopter reward — all current beta users receive INFINITY coins as a thank you!
📈 Daily earning caps added — 5 posts, 15 comments, 15 replies, 30 likes per day
💎 Premium skins now cost 150 coins — something to work toward!
🔍 Discover tab redesigned — shows trending posts from people you don't follow, ranked by engagement
👥 Mutual followers shown on profiles — 'Followed by X and 3 others'
💬 Message reactions — react to any message with emoji
↩️ Reply to specific messages — quote a message in your reply
🔥 Trending Hashtags page — see what's popular right now
🔎 Search history — recent searches saved and shown on focus
🔒 Account security — change password, change email, and 2FA setup in Settings
♿ Alt text on images — add descriptions for accessibility
📆 Scheduled posts calendar view
📊 Post analytics dashboard in Settings
❤️ Double-tap to like posts
🌙 Light mode toggle in Settings
🔗 Share your profile link from dropdown menu
📄 Link in bio — add your website to your profile
changed: 🏠 BlipVibe is now live at blipvibe.com!
💰 Shop prices rebalanced for better progression (fonts 15, skins 35, premium 150)
🛡️ DMCA policy hardened to federal litigation grade (11 sections)
📝 Privacy Policy updated with full data disclosure
⚡ Feed loads faster with infinite scroll and caching
fixed: 👍 Like counts now show correctly on profile view posts
📱 Mobile feed alignment fixed — posts match create bar width
📺 YouTube, TikTok, Instagram embeds restored on all posts
✍️ View More no longer cuts words in half

added: Message reactions — react to any message with emoji (❤️ 😂 😮 😢 👍 👎)
Reply to specific message — quote a message in your reply with visual indicator
Trending Hashtags page — see most popular hashtags ranked by post count
Search history — recent searches remembered and shown on focus, with clear option
Mutual followers on profiles — 'Followed by X and 3 others' with avatar stack
changed: Privacy Policy updated — message reactions and search history disclosed
Trending Hashtags button added to home right sidebar

added: Change Password in Settings — update password without email reset
Change Email in Settings — update email with confirmation
Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) — TOTP setup with QR code via Supabase MFA
Alt text on post images — ALT button on thumbnails for image descriptions (accessibility)
Skip-to-content link — keyboard-accessible skip link for screen readers
ARIA labels — auto-applied to all icon-only buttons via MutationObserver
Link in Bio — website URL field on profiles, shown in profile view
Post edit history — auto-logged when posts are edited (view previous versions)
Seen by on group posts — track and view who saw group announcements
Scheduled posts calendar — visual month grid view replaces flat list
DMCA notice log — admin table for documenting takedown receipt timestamps
Admin report queue — review and dismiss user/post reports from Settings
changed: Settings reorganized with Account Security section (password, email, 2FA)

added: DMCA substantial compliance shield — can reject sloppy/abusive takedown notices
DMCA no-liability clause for good faith content removal
DMCA fair use neutrality section — BlipVibe doesn't judge fair use, follows DMCA framework
changed: Counter-notification jurisdiction corrected to 'United States District Court for the Eastern District of Tennessee' (matches § 512(g) statute)
Restoration timing matches statutory language exactly: 'not less than 10 nor more than 14 business days'
Repeat infringer policy strengthened with 'multiple valid notices and other relevant factors' language

added: DMCA 'No Prior Screening' clause — legal protection for user-generated content
DMCA 'Audio & Music Content' section — users responsible for music rights
DMCA 'Standard Technical Measures' section — safe harbor compliance (§ 512(i))
Designated agent registration confirmation language
changed: DMCA contact email changed to dmca@blipvibe.com (separate from general hello@)
Repeat infringer policy strengthened — 'at sole discretion' instead of fixed strike count
DMCA policy expanded from 7 to 10 sections

added: DMCA registration number (DMCA-1070726) added to all policy pages
changed: @mentions now search all name fields (first name, last name, nickname, username, display name) — type any name to find someone
@mention dropdown shows the user's preferred display name (nickname or real name based on their setting)
Emoji picker restyled as compact 320px floating popout instead of full-width scrollable box
Consolidated all email references to hello@blipvibe.com (removed non-existent copyright@ address)
fixed: View More text no longer merges words together when expanded (missing space between visible and hidden text)
Modal close (X) button hover is now a perfect circle instead of elongated oval
Embeds (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram) now load on infinite scroll posts (missing autoFetchLinkPreviews call)

added: Scroll-to-top button — floating arrow appears after scrolling down
Character counter on post creation (5000 char limit with color warnings)
Double-tap to like — tap twice on a post to like it (mobile + desktop)
Animated like feedback — burst animation on like button + floating thumbs-up
Unsend message — 5-second undo window after sending a DM
Share Your Profile — dropdown menu option with copyable profile link
Suggested follows — after following someone, see 3 people they follow
Confirm before leaving draft — modal warns if you have unsaved post text
changed: Images now lazy-loaded automatically via MutationObserver
Infinite scroll handler debounced with requestAnimationFrame for smoother scrolling
Feed cached in sessionStorage for instant render on tab switches

added: Infinite scroll — feed loads posts in batches as you scroll, no more loading all at once
Skeleton loading states — shimmer placeholders while feed and content loads
Post draft auto-save — drafts saved to localStorage, restored when reopening post creation
Notification grouping — 'X and 4 others liked your post' instead of 5 separate notifications
Full-text post search — search post content via Postgres tsvector (requires migration)
Group invite links — shareable join link for any group, button in group view sidebar
Quote posts — quote a post with your own commentary via post dropdown menu
Multi-person DMs — create group chat conversations from messages page
Image optimization — automatic resize and WebP conversion before upload (avatars, covers, posts)
Comment pinning — post owners can pin a comment to the top of the thread
Post analytics dashboard — total posts, likes, views, comments, followers, top posts (Settings)
Daily login rewards — 5-25 coins based on consecutive login streak
Rich text in posts — **bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~, `inline code` support
Video trimming UI — preview and set start/end times before uploading video
Light mode toggle — full light theme in Settings, persists across sessions
Shareable bookmark collections — share saved post folders via copyable link
Push notifications — Capacitor FCM integration for native mobile push (requires setup)
Service worker — offline caching for static assets, faster repeat loads
changed: Feed pagination changed from 50 to 20 posts per batch for better performance
Search results now query database for posts instead of only searching loaded feed
fixed: Comment reply button on nested comments now targets correct reply (was using parent ID)
Feed like counts now fetched in parallel instead of sequentially (faster load)
Conversation data now properly sanitized for email masking
Notifications now sanitized through _sanitizeData

added: Stories — create photo/video/text stories that disappear after 24 hours, view stories in full-screen viewer with progress bar, tap to advance, view counts for own stories, delete own stories
Stories bar above feed — circular avatar rings (gradient border for unviewed, gray for viewed), 'Your Story' add button
Emoji reactions on posts — long-press/hold the like button to pick from 6 emoji reactions (❤️ 😂 😮 😢 🔥 👏)
Voice notes in DMs — tap microphone button to record, tap again to stop and send, plays inline with audio controls
Close Friends list — star button on profiles to add/remove, manage list in Settings
Download My Data (GDPR) — export all your data (profile, posts, followers, following, notifications, settings) as JSON file
Close Friends manager in Settings
Download Data button in Settings
changed: DM messages now render @mentions as clickable links
DM message content supports voice note [voice]url[/voice] format with audio player

added: Post view counts — eye icon shows how many times each post has been viewed (IntersectionObserver tracking)
Online / last seen status — green dot on DM contacts who are online, 'Active Xm ago' text on profiles
Read receipts in DMs — double-check 'Seen' indicator on your last sent message
Typing indicator in DMs — animated bouncing dots (CSS animation)
Streaks — consecutive days of interaction tracked between you and other users, fire icon + day count on profiles

User badges / achievements — 10 earnable badges (Early Adopter, First Post, Social Butterfly, Popular, Group Leader, Skin Collector, Streak Master, Photographer, Generous, Commenter) displayed on profile
Notification preferences — toggle individual notification types on/off (likes, comments, replies, follows, mentions, messages, group invites) in Settings
Message privacy setting — control who can message you (Everyone / Followers Only / Nobody) in Settings
Scheduled posts — schedule a post for future publication with date/time picker, manage pending posts in Settings
Muted users list in Settings — view and unmute muted users
Scheduled posts manager in Settings — view and cancel pending scheduled posts
fixed: Last seen interval and view observer properly cleaned up on logout
Pinned posts, badges, muted users, and notification preferences now sync to Supabase via skin_data

added: Polls in posts — add a poll with up to 6 options when creating a post, vote on polls in the feed with animated bar results
Hashtags — #tags in posts are now clickable, showing all posts with that hashtag
Copy Link — copy a direct link to any post from the post dropdown menu
Pin to Profile — pin up to 3 posts to your profile from the post dropdown menu
Mute Users — hide someone's posts without blocking them (separate from block, they won't be notified)
Report Users — report a user's profile (not just individual posts) with reasons: Spam, Harassment, Impersonation, Inappropriate Content, Other
Edit Profile button on own profile view — one click to open Edit Profile instead of navigating to Settings
Escape key closes modals across the entire app
fixed: Muted users filtered from Following and Discover feeds

changed: Page load now ~50-70% faster — 7 API calls run in parallel instead of sequentially
Group membership check reduced from N+1 queries (one per group) to a single query
fixed: Memory leak: realtime subscriptions (posts, follows, likes, notifications, messages) now cleaned up on logout
Memory leak: saveState interval now cleared on logout instead of running forever
Security: error messages escaped before HTML rendering to prevent XSS

added: Lightbox photo comments now have full feature parity with post comments — emoji button, GIF search, @mention autocomplete, comment likes/dislikes, edit and delete buttons
GIF comments in lightbox photo viewer — search and post GIFs via Klipy
@mention autocomplete in lightbox photo comment input
Comment like/dislike buttons in lightbox photo comments
Edit button for own comments in lightbox photo viewer
Clickable @mentions in lightbox photo comments open user profile
fixed: Comment modal post image now auto-fits instead of being scrollable — constrained to max 25vh with object-fit:contain
@mention dropdown now appears below the input field in post/comment modals, and above when input is at the bottom of the screen (lightbox)
sbEditPhotoComment() function added for editing photo comments

added: Invite to Group — new button on profile view lets you invite any user to any group you're in
Group invite notifications — invited users receive a clickable notification to join the group
Clicking a group invite notification opens a join confirmation modal and navigates to the group
@mention autocomplete now works in comment input fields and group chat messages
Clicking @mention tags in posts, comments, and group chat now opens that user's profile
fixed: @mention search now has a fallback when the search_profiles RPC is unavailable — uses direct table query
@mention autocomplete is more resilient — if global search fails, still shows results from your connections
Missing viewProfile() function added — fixes clicking usernames in group chat messages
Mention click handlers now bound in comment modals and group chat messages (were previously missing)

added: 'mention' is now a proper notification type in the database — no longer stored as 'system'
New Mentions tab in notifications — filter to see only @mention notifications with @ icon
@mention notifications now work in comments, photo comments, and group chat messages (previously only posts and group posts)
Mention notifications show context — 'mentioned you in a comment', 'a photo comment', 'a group chat message' instead of generic 'a post'
@mention autocomplete now prioritizes your followers and following — connections show first, remaining slots filled by global search, max 5 results
Camera icon button in post and group post footers — quick shortcut to add photos/videos without scrolling to the drop zone
@mention tagging system — type @ in posts to tag any user (autocomplete with avatar, name, username)
Group posts restrict @mentions to group members only
Mentioned usernames render as clickable links (purple, opens profile) in feed, group, search, saved, and profile posts
@mentions also work in comments
Tagged users receive a notification when mentioned in a post
New 'Stream' template — single-column stacked layout: cover photo, horizontal profile + about me, album, suggestions + groups side-by-side, then feed (desktop only)
Mobile now uses Cinema template by default — edge-to-edge bold layout optimized for small screens
Templates are now desktop-only — hidden from shop and My Skins on mobile
New 'Pastel Dream' basic skin — soft candy pastels with flowing animated gradient on navbar and cover
New 'Pastel Aurora' premium skin — shifting lavender, mint, and peach northern lights with animated gradient movement
Group Chat system — Discord-style channels inside groups with sections, sub-channels, realtime messaging, image/video/GIF support, and admin/mod channel management (fullscreen view with back button)
Neon Wave premium skin now shows vibrant turquoise-to-purple animated gradient on top navbar, bottom mobile nav, and profile cover
New 'Deep Wave' premium skin — dark moody mints and teals with flowing gradient animation and glowing pulsing avatar border
fixed: Profile cover gradient now has rounded top corners (10px) — no more sharp square edges behind avatar on profile cards and profile views
Mobile bottom nav bar no longer floats with a gap when the browser address bar hides on scroll — background extends to fill the space
Comment modal GIF and Post buttons no longer get cut off on mobile — reduced sizing and gap for small screens
Panorama template mobile layout no longer has a gap on the right side of posts
Fixed group chat SQL migration — mod permission policies now correctly reference group_members table instead of non-existent mods column

added: First-time tutorial popup on Home feed — explains coin earning (Post +5, Comment +2, Reply +2, Like +1), community rules, and Skin Shop
First-time tutorial popup on Skin Shop — explains skins, fonts, templates, premium skins, and custom backgrounds
Tutorial state synced to Supabase (cross-device) — shows once per account, not per browser
changed: Notification tab counts now show only unread (new) notifications — resets to 0 once viewed
Unread notifications highlighted with accent border and 'New' badge
fixed: Profile avatar background corners now properly rounded (16px) on profile pages, profile views, and modals — no more sharp square edges behind the photo
Email addresses used as usernames/display names are now masked (e.g. 'jo***') across all public views — posts, comments, profiles, messages, groups, search results
Existing users with email-as-username are protected without requiring account changes

added: Section 230 safe harbor clause in Terms of Use (47 U.S.C. § 230)
Account Registration & Security section in Terms of Use
Export Compliance (OFAC) representation in Terms of Use
Waiver and Entire Agreement clauses in Terms of Use
Tennessee Information Protection Act (TIPA) section in Privacy Policy
Data Processing Agreement (DPA) disclosure in Privacy Policy
General data breach notification policy for all users
changed: Terms of Use expanded from 21 to 26 sections with full legal compliance audit
Privacy Policy expanded from 20 to 21 sections (Version 3.0)
Arbitration clause completely rewritten — Federal Arbitration Act, 30-day informal resolution, Fayette County venue, fee allocation, opt-out window, small claims exception
Warranty disclaimer strengthened to conspicuous ALL CAPS format (Tennessee UCC § 2-316)
Limitation of liability strengthened — all damage types disclaimed regardless of theory of liability
Virtual Currency section expanded — license-not-ownership, Apple compliance, forfeiture on deletion
DMCA section expanded — penalty of perjury, counter-notification procedure, § 512(f) warning
Governing law corrected from Texas to Tennessee, venue Fayette County
TOS_VERSION bumped to 4 (forces re-acceptance by all users)
Added FxTwitter API, TikTok oEmbed, and Klipy to third-party services disclosure
fixed: Governing law incorrectly referenced Texas instead of Tennessee
Privacy Policy contained Limitation of Liability and Dispute Resolution sections (removed — belong in TOS)
Privacy Policy Section 230 reference removed (belongs in TOS)
Missing parental consent requirement for minors 13-17
Account data collection did not list first_name, last_name, nickname fields

added: Video posts — upload MP4, WebM, or MOV videos (up to 50MB) in feed and group posts, displayed with play overlay in media grids and full controls in lightbox
Pull-to-refresh on mobile — swipe down from the top of any page to refresh content (feed, groups, notifications, messages, profiles)
changed: Group posts now support multiple images and videos (previously only uploaded the first image)
fixed: Videos selected in post creation modal silently failed to upload — entire pipeline (validation, upload, rendering, lightbox) now handles video types
Lightbox skipped videos when navigating media — now plays videos inline with controls and pauses on close

added: Read-only localStorage cache — app loads instantly from cached skin data while Supabase fetches fresh state in the background
Single photo delete — trash button on hover for profile pictures, cover photos, and post photos
Bulk photo delete — 'Select' button enables multi-select mode with floating action bar for batch deletion
Delete Photo option in photo context menu (three-dot menu)
Group fonts — buy, apply, and reset fonts per group via the group shop Fonts tab
Dark Prism premium skin — dark variant of Geo Prism with rainbow borders, spinning gradient nav, and pulsing prismatic glow
Wheel nav style — mobile-only swipeable bottom nav where the center icon scales up like a rolling wheel
Privacy Policy v2.0 — full legal rewrite with GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, COPPA, DMCA, Section 230, international transfers, advertising disclosure, Apple App Store terms, and liability/dispute provisions
Remove Cover Photo button — red trash button in the cover photo picker modal for both user profiles and groups, clears cover from UI and Supabase
Email-as-name validation — signup and edit profile block names/usernames that look like email addresses
changed: Photo state now tracks storage file names and post IDs for proper deletion across storage, albums, and posts
Group font saved/restored when entering/leaving group view (personal font preserved)
Group Shop skin management restricted to Admin, Co-Admin, and Moderator — regular members can browse the shop and see applied skins but cannot buy, apply, or change them
Group skins now stored on the group itself (shared skin_data column) — all members see the same skin, font, and background set by admins/mods instead of each user having their own local copy
fixed: Comment modal scrolling the feed behind it on mobile — body now position-locks when modal is open and touch events are blocked on the backdrop
Posting a comment jumping to top of page — showModal was overwriting saved scroll position when re-rendering comments inside an already-open modal
New users seeing no posts on Following tab — own posts were excluded from the default feed, now included alongside followed users' posts
App auto-navigating to a group page on restart — group-view hash no longer persists across fresh loads
Mobile home pills — 'People You May Know' and 'Trending Groups' are now single pills that open scrollable popup modals instead of inline items
Mobile group cards — Joined/Join/View text buttons replaced with themed icon-only circle buttons (check, plus, magnifying glass)
Emoji picker for desktop — smiley button on post create, group post, comment, and edit comment modals opens a categorized emoji panel with search (hidden on mobile where keyboards have native emoji)
Blurry text on premium skin backgrounds — removed heavy glow text-shadow (was 8px blur) and replaced with crisp 2px drop shadow
Premium backgrounds and group skins not persisting — loadSkinDataFromSupabase used sbGetProfile (which has skin_data column revoked) instead of sbGetOwnProfile (SECURITY DEFINER RPC that can read it)
Card transparency slider not working in groups — gpremium-dark CSS used hardcoded background overriding the color-mix opacity variable

Profile picture background color jutting out as square — added background:var(--card) to avatar wraps, removed border from modal avatars, added overflow:hidden clipping to profile view and group profile modal
Viewing someone else's profile then navigating to your own copied their skin/font — previous profile skin now properly restored before applying own
GIF picker clipped in comment modal on mobile — moved from absolute-positioned overlay to flow-based flex child so it's no longer cut off by overflow:hidden
Crop modal closing when dragging slightly off the crop area — overlay click-to-close now suppressed during active crop drag
Home feed photos preview changed from 3-column grid (2 rows) to a single scrollable row
People You May Know pill not showing on mobile — pill now always renders regardless of async suggestion load timing

changed: Supabase is now the sole source of truth for all state — localStorage no longer read or written on init/save
loadSkinDataFromSupabase() now fully replaces owned and group data instead of merging, preventing stale local values from surviving
fixed: Cross-device skin sync — changing group skins on phone then opening PC no longer overwrites phone changes with stale localStorage data
Periodic saveState() no longer pushes stale localStorage data back to Supabase every 10 seconds

added: Personal cover photo picker — 'Change Cover Photo' now opens a modal with previous uploads and re-crop option
Premium background history — previous background uploads shown as scrollable thumbnail row, click to re-apply
Group premium background history — same scrollable previous uploads picker for group background images
Mobile pills bar — People You May Know and Trending Groups shown as clickable pills above the post bar on mobile
changed: Selecting a previous photo (avatar, group profile, group cover) now opens re-crop modal instead of applying directly
Premium background uploads use unique filenames so previous uploads are preserved instead of overwritten
People You May Know and Trending Groups cards hidden from bottom of mobile feed (replaced by top pills)
fixed: PNG profile pictures showing white border/box — removed border and box-shadow from all avatar elements
Avatar background color jutting out as square — containers now clip to rounded shape with overflow:hidden
Group icon wrap showing white border and box shadow around group images

changed: Mobile nav bar redesigned — search icon replaces full search bar, notifications bell moved next to profile avatar, coins and dropdown pushed to far right
Mobile chat opens full-screen — top and bottom nav bars hidden while chatting, restored on back
Saved Posts moved from mobile bottom nav to settings dropdown menu
Profile view defaults to Photos tab instead of Albums
Following feed tab no longer shows your own posts
App always opens to home feed on new visits (removed session-based last page restore)
fixed: Group skins bleeding into personal profile — leaving a group now properly restores your personal skin state
Group skin purchases not registering — buy handlers now save to localStorage and sync to Supabase immediately
Group skins/templates resetting randomly — now synced to Supabase so they persist across devices and tab switches
Group cover photo not visible after cropping — view now refreshes after save
Group icon selection not saving — now persisted to database (requires running add-group-icon-color.sql migration)
Pill tabs and outline buttons unreadable on premium background skins — now use skin-themed solid backgrounds with backdrop blur instead of thin transparent overlays
Developer Updates modal text unreadable on themed skins — now inherits skin colors instead of using hardcoded values
Negative like/dislike counts could appear across all feed handlers
Message notification dot clipping behind nav highlight box on mobile (now uses separate absolute-positioned layer)

added: Structured display name system — first name, last name, and optional nickname fields
Display mode toggle in Edit Profile — choose to show 'First & Last Name' or 'Nickname'
Live name preview in Edit Profile modal shows how your name will appear across the app
First and last name collected during signup
GIF picker in messages — search and send GIFs via Klipy API
GIF messages render inline in chat bubbles
changed: Edit Profile modal now has separate First Name, Last Name, and Nickname fields instead of a single Name input
Search now matches against first name, last name, and nickname in addition to username and display name
Existing users' display names automatically parsed into first/last name fields via migration
Mobile message badge now shows a small themed-color dot instead of a number count
Message search now shows a full scrollable people list — following first, then others
fixed: Mobile message chat — header and input bar now stay fixed while messages scroll between them
Message input bar visible on all mobile devices (fixed layout applied at ≤768px, not just ≤640px)
Twitter/X links now show rich preview cards with images, video thumbnails, and tweet text (via FxTwitter API — Microlink couldn't scrape X)
TikTok links now show rich preview cards with thumbnails and captions (via official oEmbed API — blockquote embed was unreliable)
App now opens to home feed by default instead of remembering last page from a previous session

added: Try On preview button in Skin Shop — live-preview any skin, font, logo, icon set, coin skin, template, or nav style before buying
Group premium skin background image — upload, darkness, frosted glass, and card transparency controls (same as profile skins)
changed: Shop cards for unowned items now show 'Try On' button alongside Buy button
Try-on auto-reverts when switching to My Skins tab, navigating away, or toggling off
Purchasing an item while trying it on keeps it applied without reverting
fixed: Group premium skin background image now shows through instead of being covered by grey page background
Group premium skins without a background image now use the skin's actual theme color instead of hardcoded grey
Cross-tab skin bleeding — switching between tabs no longer overwrites group skin with personal skin
Saved posts page images stretched too wide — post cards now capped at 680px width
Group icon picker buttons now use the group's active skin color instead of default theme
Picking a group icon no longer deletes the group's profile picture

added: Combined Skins page with pill toggle between 'Skin Shop' and 'My Skins' views
changed: Skin Shop and My Skins merged into single 'Skins' nav page, freeing up a nav slot
Nav bar shows one 'Skins' link instead of separate 'Skins' and 'Skin Shop' links
Dropdown 'My Skins' opens the Skins page with My Skins toggle active
Old #skins URLs redirect to #shop with My Skins view

added: GIF search in comments — Klipy-powered GIF picker with search and trending
GIF button in comment input bar opens a 2-column searchable GIF grid
Clicking a GIF auto-posts it as a comment with inline image rendering
changed: Comment input bar now has GIF button between text input and Post button
GIF comments stored as [gif]URL[/gif] in content field (no schema changes)

added: Server-side group coin RPC (add_group_coins) — all members see same balance
Group coins earned for comments and replies in groups (+2 each)
Group post dropdown menu: Save, Report, Hide, Edit (own), Delete (own)
changed: Group coins now persist to database (shared across all users, not localStorage)
Group shop purchases sync coin spending to database
Group like/dislike properly awards both personal (+1) and group (+1) coins
Group posts now have same options as main feed posts (except Share)
fixed: Group coins from likes/dislikes never awarded (regex didn't match UUID post IDs)
No group coins awarded for commenting or replying in groups
Could earn coins for liking own posts in groups (isOwnPost now checks group feed)
Group likes/dislikes not synced to Supabase (sbToggleLike calls were missing)
Group posts missing three-dot menu (no way to edit, delete, save, report, or hide)

added: Group photos now persist to Supabase Storage (profile + cover)

changed: Personal profile feed excludes group posts
